text: Account Type: NUST Waqaar Account
Fact: Does your bank offer any account for senior citizens? Yes, NUST Waqaar Account has been developed for senior citizens.
Fact: What are the salient features of NUST Waqaar Account? It offers savings, term deposit, and profit payment.
Fact: The tenure for savings is not specified.
Fact: The tenure for term deposit is 1 year.
Fact: The minimum age to qualify for NUST Waqaar Account is 55 years.
Fact: The profit calculation for savings is based on the monthly average balance.
Fact: The profit calculation for term deposit is based on the monthly average balance.
Fact: The profit payment frequency for savings is monthly.
Fact: The profit payment frequency for term deposit is monthly.
Fact: The tenure for profit payment is one year.
Fact: The payout for profit payment is monthly.
Fact: The profit rate for term deposit is 0.1675, which is equivalent to 16.75%.
Fact: Debit card and cheque book issuance as per prevailing SOC (for linked account) is available for NUST Waqaar Account.
Fact 1: To open an NUST Waqaar Account, you need to provide a photocopy of any one of the following valid identity documents:
National Identity Card (CNIC) issued by NADRA
National Identity Card for Overseas Pakistani (NICOP) issued by NADRA
Pakistan Origin Card (POC) issued by NADRA
Passport, having a valid visa on it or any other proof of legal stay along with passport (foreign national individuals only)
Fact 2: The minimum age to qualify for opening an NUST Waqaar Account is not specified in the provided information.
Fact 3: The minimum deposit requirement for an NUST Waqaar Account is also not specified in the provided information.
Account Type: NUST Waqaar Savings Account
Fact: The minimum deposit requirement to open an NUST Waqaar Savings Account is Rs.1,000.
Account Type: NUST Waqaar Term Deposit Account
Fact: The minimum deposit requirement to open an NUST Waqaar Term Deposit account is Rs.25,000.
Note: Customer must be an account holder of NUST for placement of funds in NUST Waqaar-Term Deposit.
